title: AI Agent Usage Guidelines
description: Prevent overuse of AI agents based on transcript insights

rules.description: Don't use AI agents for simple if/else or switch statements
examples: ❌ Bad: AI agent to route PDF vs Image processing
✅ Good: Simple switch node based on file extension

rules.description: Don't use AI agents for scheduling or triggering workflows
examples: ❌ Bad: AI agent that waits for manual "scrape leads" command
✅ Good: Scheduler node that runs daily automatically

rules.description: Use AI agents only when complex reasoning or infinite possibilities exist
examples: ✅ Good: Chatbot with dynamic conversation flow
✅ Good: Content analysis with multiple possible responses
✅ Good: Dynamic decision making based on context

n8nIntegration.description: Validates if AI agent usage is appropriate
